operations.name: General Menus - Active by Menu Name
General Menus - Active by Menu Name by Category 1 and Category 2 and Category 3

params.q: values[Status]="Active" AND values[Menu Name]="{{Menu Name}}" AND  values[Category 1] = "{{Category 1}}" AND values[Category 2] = "{{Category 2}}" AND values[Category 3] = "{{Category 3}}"
